set.body: Add Breeze 2.1.0 to benchmarksJVM (JMH) and write paired gale-vs-Breeze benchmarks over core operations: gemv/gemm across sizes, axpy/dot, triangular solve, LU/QR/Cholesky factorizations, dense solve, and spectral (eigSymmetric vs eigSym) once public. Pure-JVM Breeze (F2J netlib fallback, no native BLAS) is the baseline target: GOAL is outperforming Breeze on many core operations while matching results (see gale-breeze-parity-tests). Native-BLAS comparisons belong to the v0.5 acceleration epic. Full JMH sweeps are user-run; sessions do smoke + Jmh/compile only (benchmarks/README convention).
